programme.title: Croatia vs Slovenia - Pre-2026 FIFA World Cup Friendly Matches - MD4
programme.desc: Ahead of the FIFA World Cup 2026, a final chance for the participating Nations to play together as team in a match environment. All 104 matches from the FIFA World Cup are live and exclusive only on beIN SPORTS MAX Channels from 11th June – 19th July.

programme.title: Greece vs Italy - Pre-2026 FIFA World Cup Friendly Matches - MD4
programme.desc: Ahead of the FIFA World Cup 2026, a final chance for the participating Nations to play together as team in a match environment. All 104 matches from the FIFA World Cup are live and exclusive only on beIN SPORTS MAX Channels from 11th June – 19th July.

programme.title: Ligue 1 Season Review - 2025/2026
programme.desc: ligue 1 2025/2026 review season

programme.title: France vs Northern Ireland - Pre-2026 FIFA World Cup Friendly Matches - MD4
programme.desc: Ahead of the FIFA World Cup 2026, a final chance for the participating Nations to play together as team in a match environment. All 104 matches from the FIFA World Cup are live and exclusive only on beIN SPORTS MAX Channels from 11th June – 19th July.

programme.title: Al Nassr (KSA) vs Gamba Osaka (JPN) - AFC Champions League Two 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The AFC Champions League Two is the second-tier competition of Asian club football, ranked below the AFC Champions League Elite. Participation in the competition is open to clubs from the top 12 nations in the East and the West region based on the AFC club competitions ranking. All games are live and exclusive only on beIN.

programme.title: Caracas (VEN) vs Botafogo (BRA) - Conmebol Sudamericana Group Stage - MD6
programme.desc: Live and exclusive coverage from South American of the Copa Sudamericana.

programme.title: Azerbaijan vs San Marino - Pre-2026 FIFA World Cup Friendly Matches - MD4
programme.desc: Ahead of the FIFA World Cup 2026, a final chance for the participating Nations to play together as team in a match environment. All 104 matches from the FIFA World Cup are live and exclusive only on beIN SPORTS MAX Channels from 11th June – 19th July.

programme.title: UEL/UECL Magazine 2025/2026 - UEL Season Review
programme.desc: A preview of the UEFA Europa League and the UEFA Conference League fixtures. Both competitions are live and exclusive only on beIN.

programme.title: Senegal vs Tanzania - CAF U17 Africa Cup of Nations Morocco 2026 -Finals
programme.desc: CAF U17 Africa Cup of Nations is the annual African youth football tournament organized by Confederation of African Football (CAF) for players aged 17 and below. Morocco was chosen as the host of this edition. The top 10 teams qualified for the 2026 FIFA U-17 World Cup in Qatar as the CAF representatives. Morocco are the defending champions.

programme.title: In the footsteps of Khvicha Kvaratskhelia
programme.desc: Khvicha Kvaratskhelia joined PSG and for his first season, he won the UEFA Champions League. Originally from Georgia, where did he start to play football.

programme.title: Al Ahli (KSA) vs FC Machida Zelvia (JPN) - AFC Champions League Elite 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The AFC Champions League Elite is contested by Asia's top-division football clubs. It is the most prestigious club competition in Asian football, played by the national league champions. A total of 24 clubs compete in the league stage of the competition, divided into East and West regions (12 teams each). All games are live and exclusive only on be

programme.title: Al Nassr (KSA) vs Gamba Osaka (JPN) - AFC Champions League Two 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The AFC Champions League Two is the second-tier competition of Asian club football, ranked below the AFC Champions League Elite. Participation in the competition is open to clubs from the top 12 nations in the East and the West region based on the AFC club competitions ranking. All games are live and exclusive only on beIN.

programme.title: In the footsteps of Khvicha Kvaratskhelia
programme.desc: Khvicha Kvaratskhelia joined PSG and for his first season, he won the UEFA Champions League. Originally from Georgia, where did he start to play football.

programme.desc: The AFC Champions League Elite is contested by Asia's top-division football clubs. programme.desc: The AFC Champions League Two is the second-tier competition of Asian club football, ranked below the AFC Champions League Elite. Participation in the competition is open to clubs from the top 12 nations in the East and the West region based on the AFC club competitions ranking. All games are live and exclusive only on beIN.

programme.title: Morocco vs Egypt - CAF U17 Africa Cup of Nations Morocco 2026 -Third Place
programme.desc: CAF U17 Africa Cup of Nations is the annual African youth football tournament organized by Confederation of African Football (CAF) for players aged 17 and below. Morocco was chosen as the host of this edition. The top 10 teams qualified for the 2026 FIFA U-17 World Cup in Qatar as the CAF representatives. Morocco are the defending champions.

programme.title: Argentina - Teams 2026
programme.desc: What are the ambitions for Argentina for the FIFA World Cup 2026

programme.title: Jordan - Teams 2026
programme.desc: What are the ambitions for Jordan for the FIFA World Cup 2026

programme.title: Algeria - Teams 2026
programme.desc: What are the ambitions for Algeria for the FIFA World Cup 2026

programme.title: The Final Story
programme.desc: The unreleased third instalment in the series — following the Champions League and FA Cup editions — bringstogether players from across the game to explore what ittruly takes to win the World Cup. A universal perspective, beyond any single nation or tournament.

programme.title: Countdown Concert, FIFA World Cup 2026™
programme.desc: On the eve of the FIFA World Cup 2026, a concert in three of the FIFA World Cup Cities. Mexico City, Toronto in Canada, and Los Angeles in the USA all host a celebration of music as the world counts down to the biggest World Cup ever. All 104 matches are live and exclusive on beIN MAX Channels with a choice of Arabic, English and French commentary.

programme.title: Argentina vs England - FIFA World Cup Mexico 1986
programme.desc: Highlights of Argentina v England from the 1986 FIFA World Cup Mexico quarter-finals.

programme.title: The Last Word
programme.desc: Every day during the FIFA World Cup 2026™, “The Last Word” is the definitive studio comment on the match action from the previous 24 hours. All 104 FIFA World Cup 2026 matches are live and exclusive on beIN with a choice of Arabic, English and French studio and match commentary.

programme.title: World Today
programme.desc: “World Today” is a live daily studio from beIN looking forward to all the upcoming FIFA World Cup 2026™ FIFA World Cup action from USA, Mexico and Canada. All 104 FIFA World Cup 2026 matches are live and exclusive on beIN with a choice of Arabic, English and French studio and match commentary.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: Quiz about the FIFA World Cup 2026

programme.title: World Today

All 104 FIFA World Cup 2026 matches are live and exclusive on beIN with a choice of Arabic, English and French studio and match commentary.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: “Countdown” is a beIN match day studio from the FIFA World Cup 2026™ broadcast live ahead of the pre match studio. “Countdown” covers the arrival of the players, coaching staff and fans as they experience the matchday stadium and atmosphere for the first time. All 104 FIFA World Cup 2026 matches are live and exclusive on beIN with a choice of Arabi

programme.title: Mexico vs South Africa - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: All 104 matches from the FIFA World Cup 2026™ are broadcast live and exclusive on beIN SPORTS with a choice of Arabic, English and French studio and match commentary. The FIFA World Cup 2026™ will be the 23rd edition of the tournament and the first to feature 48 teams and three host countries: Canada, Mexico and the USA.

programme.desc: All 104 matches from the FIFA World Cup 2026™ are broadcast live and exclusive on beIN SPORTS with a choice of Arabic, English and French studio and match commentary.
